title: Create and modify scripts by using Windows PowerShell
summary: This learning path explains how to create and modify scripts. It covers useful scripting techniques that include importing data from a file, accepting user input, and error handling.

sections.title: Create and modify scripts by using Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: This learning path explains how to create and modify scripts. It covers useful scripting techniques that include importing data from a file, accepting user input, and error handling.

lessons.title: Create and run scripts by using Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to create and run scripts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-run-scripts-use-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create and run scripts by using Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Work with scripting constructs in Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to use scripting constructs for iteration and decision making in Windows PowerShell.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-script-constructs-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Work with scripting constructs in Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Import data in different formats for use in scripts by using Windows PowerShell cmdlets
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to import data from a text file, CSV file, XML file, and JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) file.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/import-data-different-formats-for-use-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Import data in different formats for use in scripts by using Windows PowerShell cmdlets

lessons.title: Use methods to accept user inputs in Windows PowerShell scripts
lessons.content_md:
This method explains multiple methods for accepting user input in a Windows PowerShell script.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-methods-to-accept-user-inputs-windows-powershell-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use methods to accept user inputs in Windows PowerShell scripts

lessons.title: Troubleshoot scripts and handle errors in Windows PowerShell

This module covers troubleshooting PowerShell scripts and understanding error messages.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/troubleshoot-scripts-handle-errors-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Troubleshoot scripts and handle errors in Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Use functions and modules in Windows PowerShell scripts
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to create modules and functions in Windows PowerShell scripts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-functions-modules-windows-powershell-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use functions and modules in Windows PowerShell scripts

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Create and modify scripts by using Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Create and modify scripts by using Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
